# QNFO: The Ultrametric Foundation
> A unified thesis on number, time, knowledge, and computation.
> Page: https://deep.qwav.tech/papers/ultrametric-foundation/

## Abstract
Positional notation is inherently an ultrametric tree of nested cycles. The Archimedean line is a derived abstraction. Recovering the native ultrametric resolves cascading errors across mathematics, physics, epistemology, education, quantum computing, and interface design.

## Sections
- Part I: The Core Discovery — "10" misnomer, silent radix, silent metric, p-adic counter-demonstration, Laws of Form
- Part II: Time as the Primary Domain — nested cycles, Compton frequency, Zitterbewegung, cosmological time-reversal
- Part III: Epistemology of the Shift — direction of epistemic risk, antifragile knowledge systems, mathematics as relational grammar
- Part IV: Practical Applications — p-adic education, ultrametric quantum computing, Archimedean interfaces
- Part V: The Unified Vision — nested-ring architecture, all-encompassing thesis
